The contact owns a 2017 Jaguar XE. The contact stated that while driving at an undisclosed speed, the contact noticed an abnormally strong fuel odor. The contact parked the vehicle. Upon inspecting the vehicle, the contact noticed that there was a large amount of diesel on the gr

narrative.headline: What 2017 Jaguar Xe owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 20 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
